slides.heading: Production GenAI Inference Stack
slides.subheading: Red Hat AI's offerings provide value at all layers of the stack

slides.heading: Case study: optimized model repository
slides.challenge: The SRE team was tasked with managing an H100 cluster supporting a diverse suite of Mistral models used across the company. Their key challenge was ensuring efficient deployment and evaluation of these models while maintaining performance and consistency across platforms.
slides.solution: The team leveraged FP8 pre-quantized checkpoints for the entire suite of Mistral models. These optimized checkpoints streamlined deployment on the H100 cluster and enabled consistency across hardware setups.
slides.result: Optimizing Mistral family deployment on NVIDIA Hopper GPUs

slides.heading: Thank you
